metadata.description: Portable issue-tracking skills + slash commands for Claude Code, with GitHub and Jira backends. Self-contained single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: agent-issue-tracker
plugins.description: Portable issue-tracking skills + slash commands for Claude Code, with GitHub and Jira backends. Bundles six skills (bug-tracking, feature-request, followup-tracking, initiative-tracking, skill-currency, tracker-contribute), nine slash commands (/tracker-init, /tracker-doctor, /resume-initiative, /work-issue, /audit-skills, /file-bug, /file-feature, /file-followup, /file-epic), and a backend interface contract with implementations for the gh CLI and the Atlassian Remote MCP.
